comment: Build-time narration inputs (NOT in data/: presentation assets never churn the sim dataVersion). House rule: every generation uses the with-timestamps endpoint and stores alignment beside the audio. Voice: calm documentary read, no drama.

lines.text: You crossed the threshold, and the systems held. Enough understanding was in place when it counted. Be suspicious of how you got here. The numbers will tell you.

You crossed the threshold with systems you did not understand. There was no single dramatic moment. There was a Tuesday, and then a different kind of world. The reports looked fine. That was the problem.
The rival reached decisive capability first. The race you were running ended in a world someone else designed. Some of your choices still mattered. Fewer than you hoped.
You signed the verified slowdown. It cost you politically, it cost speed, and nobody throws parades for the disaster that did not happen. Maintenance is underrated.
The country broke before the question resolved. The machines were never the immediate problem. The bill for ignoring the humans was.

voiceNote: Michel-supplied narrator (2026-07-04), female, proven in the story project; replaces the placeholder. Generation stays held until the Phase-3 gate.
